title: Error on "rank() over (order by sum(.."
poc: CREATE TABLE score_table (s_name VARCHAR(255), subject VARCHAR(255), score INT);

select
   s_name,
   sum(score) as totalscore,
   rank() over (order by sum(score) desc) -- cannot use alias 'totalscore' here
 from score_table
 group by s_name;

select
   s_name,
   sum(score)
 from score_table
 group by s_name
 order by sum(score) desc;
key_bug_features: Using alias in rank() over clause causes error
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE student_scores (student_id INT PRIMARY KEY, subject VARCHAR(100), score FLOAT CHECK (score >= 0));
SELECT student_id, SUM(score) AS total_score, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(score) DESC) FROM student_scores GROUP BY student_id;
